roles.name: Frontend Developer
commonProjects: Personal portfolio website
Weather app consuming a public API
E-commerce product listing page with cart
Responsive landing page clone
Movie search app using a REST API
learningPriorities: Master semantic HTML and modern CSS layouts (Flexbox, Grid)
Build fluency in JavaScript fundamentals and ES6+
Learn React core concepts: components, props, hooks, state
Practice responsive, mobile-first design
Adopt Git and component-based project structure

roles.name: Backend Developer
commonProjects: REST API for a notes or task app
CRUD API with MongoDB and Express
User authentication API with JWT
Blog backend with comments and routes
URL shortener service
learningPriorities: Build REST APIs with Node.js and Express
Model and query data with MongoDB
Implement CRUD operations end to end
Add authentication and input validation
Practice clean error handling and API testing

roles.name: Full Stack Developer
commonProjects: MERN task manager with authentication
Full-stack blog with React frontend and Node API
E-commerce app with product catalog and cart
Social feed app with posts and likes
Expense tracker with charts and a database
learningPriorities: Connect a React frontend to a Node/Express API
Design and consume REST endpoints
Persist data with MongoDB
Add user authentication across the stack
Deploy a full-stack app and manage environment config

roles.name: React Developer
commonProjects: Multi-page SPA with React Router
Reusable component library or design system
Todo app with global state management
Dashboard consuming a REST API
Real-time search and filtering UI
learningPriorities: Master React hooks (useState, useEffect, useContext)
Manage component and global state cleanly
Compose reusable, prop-driven components
Handle routing and data fetching in React
Optimize rendering and structure scalable apps

roles.name: Node.js Developer
commonProjects: REST API server with Express middleware
CRUD service backed by a database
Authentication and authorization API
File upload or image processing service
Real-time chat backend with WebSockets
learningPriorities: Understand the Node.js runtime and event loop
Build APIs and middleware with Express
Work confidently with async/await and Promises
Connect to and query a database
Structure projects with clean error handling and testing

roles.name: Software Engineer Intern
commonProjects: Console or web app demonstrating core CS concepts
Algorithm and data-structure problem sets (e.g., LeetCode)
Small full-stack or CRUD application
Open-source contribution or team hackathon project
CLI tool that solves a real problem
learningPriorities: Strengthen data structures and algorithms
Apply object-oriented programming principles
Practice problem solving and debugging
Collaborate using Git and pull requests
Build at least one end-to-end project portfolio piece

roles.name: Data Analyst
commonProjects: Sales dashboard from a public dataset
SQL analysis of an e-commerce database
Exploratory data analysis notebook in Python
Customer churn analysis with visualizations
A/B test result analysis and writeup
learningPriorities: Write SQL to extract and aggregate data
Clean and prepare messy real-world datasets
Summarize data with descriptive statistics
Build clear charts and dashboards that tell a story
Communicate findings to non-technical stakeholders

roles.name: Machine Learning Engineer
commonProjects: Classification model on a Kaggle dataset
House price regression with scikit-learn
Sentiment analysis on text reviews
Image classifier with a neural network
End-to-end ML pipeline with a deployed API
learningPriorities: Master data manipulation with Pandas and NumPy
Train and evaluate models with scikit-learn
Understand core ML algorithms and metrics
Apply statistics to validate model results
Deploy a trained model behind a simple API

roles.name: DevOps Engineer
commonProjects: CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
Dockerize a multi-service app
Provision cloud infrastructure with Terraform
Deploy and monitor an app on a cloud VM
Automated deployment with rollback
learningPriorities: Be comfortable on the Linux command line and Bash
Containerize applications with Docker
Build CI/CD pipelines that test and deploy automatically
Provision and manage cloud infrastructure
Add monitoring, logging, and alerting

roles.name: Mobile App Developer
commonProjects: To-do mobile app with local storage
Weather app consuming a REST API
Notes app with Firebase sync
News reader with navigation between screens
Expense tracker with charts
learningPriorities: Build screens and layouts for mobile devices
Consume REST APIs and handle loading/error states
Manage app state and navigation cleanly
Design touch-friendly, responsive UI
Persist data locally and sync with a backend

roles.name: Product Manager
commonProjects: Product requirements document for a real app idea
User research study with interviews and findings
Feature prioritization framework and roadmap
Competitive analysis and product teardown
Metrics dashboard defining success for a feature
learningPriorities: Translate user problems into a product strategy
Run user research and synthesize insights
Build and communicate a prioritized roadmap
Use data and metrics to drive decisions
Work in agile cycles with engineering and design
